title: Resource Plan
description: Deterministic resource allocation plan produced by the Resource Allocator. Consumed by the Hermes Runtime Adapter to configure delegate_task calls.

plan_status.description: Overall allocation status. BLOCKED means no execution should proceed.

block_reason.description: When plan_status=BLOCKED, the reason allocation failed. Absent when ALLOCATED.

provider.description: Provider name for the Maker sub-agent.

model.description: Model identifier for the Maker sub-agent.

reasoning_effort.description: Reasoning effort level for the Maker.

max_iterations.description: Maximum conversation turns for the Maker sub-agent. 0 when plan_status=BLOCKED.

checker.description: Checker configuration. null when no checker is allocated.

provider.description: Provider name for the Checker sub-agent.

model.description: Model identifier for the Checker sub-agent.

reasoning_effort.description: Reasoning effort level for the Checker.

max_iterations.description: Maximum conversation turns for the Checker sub-agent. 0 when plan_status=BLOCKED.

token_budget.description: Planned token budget. APPROXIMATE only — Hermes has no hard token gate.

status.description: Whether the planned budget is within the Human-authorized boundary.

accuracy.description: Always APPROXIMATE for MVP. Token budget is a planning constraint, not a hard runtime gate.

context_strategy.description: shared = Maker runs in parent context; isolated = separate delegate_task with no shared state.

parallelism.description: Number of parallel workers. 1 = serial execution. 0 when plan_status=BLOCKED.
